name: self-healing-playwright-framework
description: Playwright tests with multi-strategy self-healing locators

scripts.pack:sdk: npm run build:sdk && mkdir -p dist-packages && npm pack -w ai-healing-sdk --pack-destination ./dist-packages
scripts.install:plug-and-play-demo: npm run build:sdk && npm install --prefix examples/playwright-plug-and-play
scripts.test:plug-and-play: npm run install:plug-and-play-demo && npm run test:headed --prefix examples/playwright-plug-and-play
scripts.test:plug-and-play:ci: npm run install:plug-and-play-demo && npm test --prefix examples/playwright-plug-and-play
scripts.build:locator-agent: npm run build:sdk && npm run build -w locator-agent
scripts.build:autonomous-test-agent: npm run build:autonomous-contracts && npm run build -w autonomous-test-agent
scripts.build:autonomous-agent: npm run build:autonomous-test-agent && npm run build:llm-locator-agent
scripts.build:llm-locator-agent: npm run build:sdk && npm run build -w llm-provider && npm run build -w locator-agent && npm run build -w llm-locator-agent
scripts.build:healing-service: npm run build:autonomous-agent && npm run build -w healing-service
scripts.test:autonomous-login: npm run build:autonomous-agent && playwright test tests/autonomous-login.spec.ts
scripts.test:autonomous-llm-login: npm run build:autonomous-agent && RUN_AUTONOMOUS_LLM=1 playwright test tests/autonomous-login-llm.spec.ts
scripts.test:autonomous-eval: npm run build:autonomous-agent && RUN_AUTONOMOUS_EVAL=1 RUN_AUTONOMOUS_LLM=1 AUTONOMOUS_ALLOW_LLM_IN_CI=1 playwright test tests/autonomous-evaluation.spec.ts
scripts.test:autonomous-held-out: npm run build:autonomous-agent && RUN_AUTONOMOUS_HELD_OUT=1 RUN_AUTONOMOUS_LLM=1 AUTONOMOUS_PLANNER=llm AUTONOMOUS_ALLOW_LLM_IN_CI=1 AUTONOMOUS_LLM_VERIFY=1 playwright test tests/autonomous-held-out.spec.ts
scripts.test:autonomous-checkout: npm run build:autonomous-agent && playwright test tests/autonomous-checkout.spec.ts
scripts.test:autonomous: npm run build:autonomous-agent && playwright test tests/autonomous-login.spec.ts tests/autonomous-checkout.spec.ts
scripts.test:autonomous-ci-smoke: npm run build:autonomous-agent && RUN_AUTONOMOUS_CI=1 playwright test tests/autonomous-ci-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.healing-service: npm run build:healing-service && npm run start -w healing-service
scripts.test:llm-agent: npm run build:llm-locator-agent && RUN_UNIT_TESTS=1 playwright test tests/llm-provider.unit.spec.ts tests/llm-locator-agent.unit.spec.ts tests/agentic-healing.unit.spec.ts
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:autonomous-agent && RUN_UNIT_TESTS=1 playwright test tests/dom-scan-discovery.unit.spec.ts tests/healing-service.unit.spec.ts tests/locator-agent.unit.spec.ts tests/llm-provider.unit.spec.ts tests/llm-locator-agent.unit.spec.ts tests/agentic-healing.unit.spec.ts tests/autonomous-test-agent.unit.spec.ts tests/autonomous-evaluation.unit.spec.ts tests/autonomous-governance.unit.spec.ts tests/autonomous-llm-planner.unit.spec.ts tests/autonomous-llm-verification.unit.spec.ts tests/autonomous-page-state.unit.spec.ts tests/maintenance-agent.unit.spec.ts tests/maintenance-jira.unit.spec.ts tests/maintenance-phase15.unit.spec.ts
scripts.publish:maintenance-tickets: npm run build:autonomous-agent && MAINTENANCE_PUBLISH_JIRA=1 node scripts/publish-maintenance-tickets.mjs
scripts.publish:ci-jira-ticket: npm run build:autonomous-agent && MAINTENANCE_PUBLISH_JIRA=1 node scripts/publish-ci-jira-ticket.mjs
